top_reddit.title: Lost my best friend over her trying to charge me insane rent
top_reddit.snippet:
I (32f) had a best friend (32f) for seven years. We met teaching English in Thailand and were roommates. I was even the Maid of Honor at her wedding.

My friend, lets call her Sarah, is starting an airbnb llama farm/yoga retreat and before I met my partner two years ago, had always said she would love for me to work with her.
